ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Release year of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the movie */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Length of the movie in minutes */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Names of the main cast members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, content manager, subscriber) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the user (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method of the user (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leaving the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text left by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being recommended */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score of the recommendation (higher is better) */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was generated */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the recommendation algorithm used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "multimedia" (
  "multimedia_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each multimedia content */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the content belongs to */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., poster, trailer) */,
  "content_url" TEXT /* URL of the content */,
  "content_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the content */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the content was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("multimedia_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multimedia_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analytics data (e.g., website, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
